title: Ordered Witness
setting: Spiral Spire — Governance Hall (hexagonal council chamber)

scenes.summary: Marcus and Senna arrive back at the Spire; runners intercept with council summons
Governance hall described — hexagonal, six tongue-walls, seven seats. Council members introduced with visual presence.
visual_anchors_used: Aria: auburn hair with silver, one-eyebrow criticism
Alexander: open face, laugh-lines, dirt on cuffs
Eldrin: age as elegance, threshold humor in eyes
Jorren: square face, bronze spectacles, slate and ink
Bram: built like maintenance and bad sleep
Nadia: wind-burned, grin first, barely still
Marcus: witness chair, no tongue affiliation

scenes.summary: Marcus presents the field audit findings — systems confirmed, gaps identified. Sera Voss's death as evidence of the system's inability to process endings.
Dominion evidence presented: Dremsreach probes, Voss recruitment, Kael's handler pattern. Senna reveals the handler timeline.
Marcus explains the keys as relationships, not objects. Ordered attestation as defense. Centralization dissolves the lock. Polly: 'The keys dissolve. And the door opens.'
Aria as Boundary Architect explains Izack's understanding, the seventh silence gap, why he bound himself into the substrate. Nadia asks where he is. Polly describes his state.
Marcus proposes the system must learn from its own failures. Kael's hospice as first self-improvement cycle. HYDRA concept: sensing distinct from classifying distinct from acting.
emotional_beats: Kael reframed as tragedy not evil

scenes.summary: Marcus volunteers to descend to the deep observatory. Alexander asks him to tell Izack his son wants to come home (both sons). Senna declares she's going too. Aria approves.
Council votes in tongue order: KO→AV→RU→CA→UM→DR. Each vote builds on the prior. Marcus perceives the sequence as cryptographic ceremony.
Council disperses. Character moments: Alexander's shoulder grip, Nadia's arm punch, Jorren's nod, Bram's silent boot evaluation. Polly describes what Marcus will find. Senna takes his hand.

system_imports.ordered_attestation_paths: Council vote in KO→AV→RU→CA→UM→DR sequence; first signer establishes context, each subsequent builds; order changes governance weight; diversity of orderings is itself defense
system_imports.hydra_recon_vs_action: Marcus articulates sensing/classifying/acting as distinct operations; audit was sensing, intelligence report is classification, next step is distributed action
system_imports.training_pipeline_self_learning: System must learn from its own failures; every unacknowledged death/stolen warrant/unmonitored boundary is data; Kael's hospice was first self-improvement cycle

backward.ch05: Sera Voss callback — 'called me an entity to my face'; oversight chamber vs governance hall
backward.ch09: Izack portrait — 'tired eyes, too-late dinner'; gallery discovery
backward.ch20: Death-ledger / Shardfold witness chains referenced in audit presentation
backward.ch23: Voss corridor warrant theft; Underroot icosahedral root network
backward.ch24: Dremsreach probes; ice-shelf resonance mapping; handler revelation; hand-holding; audit as intelligence report

forward.ch26: Breach — Kael's dormant infrastructure activates; Dominion exploits chaos
forward.ch27: Deep observatory — Marcus meets Izack; seventh silence; 'Bring him home'; Fizzlecress
